title: Iphigin
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Iphigin |region=*[[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[Southern Core]]The [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the portions of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] and [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] that fall in grid square L-13 in the [[Southern Core]]. |sector= |system=[[Iphigin system/Legends|Iphigin system]] |coordinates=L-13 |xyz= |distance= |suns=1''[[Specter of the Past]]'' |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=Terrestrial |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate=[[Temperature/Legends|Temperate]]''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species=[[Iphigini]] |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation=[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] }} {{Quote|Yeah, well, it's always crowded around Iphigin. Main transfer point for this sector and at least two others.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], to [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]|}} '''Iphigin''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Iphigin system/Legends|Iphigin system]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] and the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Iphigini]] species. ==Description== Iphigin was a bluish-red planet in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], in a sector inhabited by the [[Diamal]]a bordering the [[Ishori Confederene]]. It was the home planet of the [[Iphigini]] species. It was one of the most important [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] tradeworlds, serving its own and two neighboring sectors. It was protected by a [[Golan I Space Defense Platform/Legends|Golan I]] platform. The [[Iphigin Spaceport Directorate]] guided all spacecraft approaching and leaving the planet. ==History== {{Quote|What's this all about?''"
"''What's it always about at this end of the Core. The Diamala and Ishori are at it again.''"
"''Let me guess. Commerce and resource-sharing dispute?''"
"''Close. This time it's shipping security. The Diamala don't like having to rely on local patrol ships when they're coming into Ishori ports. The Ishori, on the other hand, don't want armed Diamala ships coming into their systems.|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|}} In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], Iphigin was the site of a conference organized by [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Ponc Gavrisom]] to solve an [[Ishori]]–[[Diamal]] dispute. They were unable to do so, even with the help of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], and the dispute soon became part of the greater [[Caamas Document Crisis]]. Solo, Chewbacca, and Skywalker also helped to defend the planet when it was [[Raid at Iphigin|attacked]] by the [[Cavrilhu Pirates]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{C|See"Iphigini"}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:New Republic planets]] [[Category:Planets in the Core Worlds]] [[Category:Planets in the Southern Core]]
